data.title: Tampoi, Johor
data.description: A comfortable BALCONY ROOM (single) for FEMALE tenant at Epic Residences, JB  Room A: Partitioned Balcony room with sharing bathroom (RM950)  Move-in ready. Just bring your personal belongings, everything else is provided. The rental includes WIFI, common utilities, and bi-monthly cleaning.  Only the aircond usage will be charged based on consumption.  Located near Larkin Sentral, perfect for those who commute to Singapore by bus.  Situated on the 9th floor with top-notch full condo facilities, even better than many of the newer condos in the area.  Open to all races — we say no to racism. Currently, there are three respectable women of different backgrounds living here who have been taking great care of the unit.  For more details, quickly contact me.
